entry.title: KataGo installation
entry.content:
KataGo is the strongest open source Go AI available online.
It’s source code and binaries is on Github link.

Get the model file

If you have a modern GPU (GCN/Volta architecture and subsequent models), I suggest you download the openCL version.
If you don’t have a modern GPU or you want to run it on CPU, download the Eigen version.

Windows:

openCL

&&

Eigen

Linux:

openCL

&&

Eigen

It is not recommended that you use CUDA version because you should have a NVIDIA GPU first and subsequent configuration will be complicated.

Unzip the file, we will use it after.

Get KaTrain

This is the GUI officially recommended by KataGo ->

Github Link

It can run on Windows/Linux/macOS, but:

  • The official binary does not have a linux version;
  • The macOS version can’t run on arm64 architecture, you’d use Rosetta 2 translate it to x86_64.

Windows version:

Download

Unzip it and run KaTrain.exe ->

Open the menu bar, choose General & Engine Settings ->

Input KataGo model binary path to Path to KataGo executable box.
Now it works!

Addition tricks

These parameter can be fine tuned.
The larger the number of Maximum number of visits in analysis, the stronger the AI.

entry.title: Using C++ to Realize the Solving of Unary Quadratic Equation
entry.content:
Now that I have written the solution process of the quadratic equation in Rust language, and I have already written it in C++.
Here is it.

Final codes

The details

Create program

Main function part

Let’s create a main function first:

And declare a b c variables:

I wanna make a repetitive function (different from the function of the Rust version).
If custom want to repeat the calculation process just type anything and press enter, and type n to exit.

The next step is to get user input~

Calculation function part

Create it~
(I guess we don’t need a return value)

Declare delta variables:

Add conditional judgment:

Now the calculation function is done.

Integrate

The nya function here must be before the main function, otherwise it cannot be compiled.

Debugging

Different operating systems and compilers are different. Here we take macOS + Clang as an example:

entry.title: Arch Linux deploy Docker
entry.content:
The container is really an excellent design, borrowing the host kernel to run all Headless programs without worrying about security issues.

Prerequisites

  • Arch Linux x86_64
  • More than 2GB RAM
  • root permissions

Start installation

  1. Install docker package by using pacman ->
  2. Make docker daemon start automaticly while booting the system ->
  3. Start docker service ->
  4. To join the docker group that is allowed to use the docker daemon: ->
  5. Restart the docker daemon ->

Subsequent part

  1. Verify docker is running ->
  2. This will pull down and run the, “Hello World” docker container from dockerhub ->

Some tricks

  1. List container images ->
  2. List all of the containers ->
  3. Delete container -> For this CONTAINER_NUMBER, shorthands are supported.
  4. Delete images -> This IMAGE_NUMBER also support shorthands.
  5. Start Linux image and chroot into it -> This command is to create a container called arch-test using the archlinux image as a template and chroot into it.

    Use docker ps to view container informations.

entry.title: Arch Linux 安装教程
entry.content:
This article is only for China mainland(using Chinese Simplefid language)

此文章适用于现代（2010年及以后）的x86_64机器
在R3 3200U的老机器退役后，我这里已没有任何类Unix机器，包括虚拟机和WSL以及容器类（MinGW）。
在Windows下，原生的RUST只能使用MSVC，随够用但总觉优化不够好，遂试图在实体机上安装Arch Linux。
截至教程发布日，Arch Linux Live CD的最新版本是11月的，经测试没有问题。

支持的硬件

·x86_64架构的CPU，建议为2006年以后的CPU
·至少有1GB内存（Arch Wiki最小的512MB现在已经无法启动11月的Live CD）
·使用UEFI引导的主板
·可用的网络连接
·20GB可用的硬盘空间

具体步骤

制作安装介质

  1. 到镜像站去下载最新的Arch Linux Live CD iso ->
    https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/archlinux/iso/latest/archlinux-x86_64.iso
  2. 使用工具将其写入到USB驱动器或者刻录光盘（不建议）
    推荐写入工具balenaEtcher
  3. 重启后按主板厂商的指引设置USB启动或选择USB启动（若失败请先关闭安全启动[1]）
  4. 从USB驱动器引导后就进入了Live CD环境

Live CD设置

  1. 连接网络 -> 若ip addr返回了wlan0的信息并且下面有正确的ip，则代表网络已连接成功。
    可选：停止reflector服务，防止/etc/pacman.d/mirrorlist被写入其他地区镜像 ->
  2. 配置镜像
    由于结界，我们无法直接从结界外部的镜像站获取软件包。在Live CD内也无法使用魔法绕过结界，所以我们还是步前辈们的足迹，使用他们搭建好的国内镜像站（注意：这一步须在reflector.service停止后进行，可手动结束或等待其执行完成，否则编辑完的mirrorlist会被它刷写） ->
    • 在文件开头按i进入insert模式，添加Server = https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/archlinux/$repo/os/$arch
    • 按esc退出insert模式，输入:wq保存并退出vim

磁盘相关

  1. 磁盘分区 ->
    • 使用GPT分区表（这是UEFI引导的必须条件）
    • 推荐分区方案 ->
      • EFI分区：不小于4MB，类型：EFI System
      • 主分区：不小于10GB，类型：Linux filesystem
        （建议在分区内部建立一个swapfile来承担swap的任务）
    • 结束后，选Write再输入yes来写入分区表，再选Quit退出
  2. 建立文件系统 ->
    主分区使用ext4文件系统
  3. 挂载分区 ->
  4. 创建swapfile ->

安装系统

目标为一个日常使用的桌面环境，使用KDE

  1. pacstrap安装必要的包 ->
  2. 生成fstab ->
  3. chroot到新系统 -> 如果你想装一个服务器用基本系统（没有GUI）
    这是我的习惯 ->

初步配置系统

  1. 时间设置 ->
  2. 用户设置 -> 然后设个密码~
  3. 编辑sudoers -> 将文件中的# %wheel ALL=(ALL:ALL) ALL（大概率在第85行）的注释取消，使得wheel组里的用户可以使用sudo
  4. 配置zsh ->
  5. 更改默认Shell -> 将默认Shell更改为/bin/zsh
  6. 本地化 ->
    使用SSH连接所以不用担心字符异常 去掉# zh_CN.UTF-8 UTF-8的注释符号“#”
    最后运行 ->
  7. 服务设置 ->
  8. 引导设置 ->
  9. 退出chroot环境并重启 -> 至此Arch Linux的安装就完成了
    接下来是配置部分

进一步配置系统

现在我们重启后，大概就是这样的 ->

  1. 输入法配置
    如果直接右键-配置是会显示这个的 ->

    这会进入文本配置，显然我们是不懂的（
    所以要安装fcitx5-configtool ->

    然后再右键-配置就可以看到 ->

    然而现在按Ctrl+Tab是不能切换到拼音输入法的，我们需要把Fcitx5设为默认输入法并自动启动 ->

    把下面的东西加进去 ->

    重新登录就可以正常使用啦~
    更多用法请参阅Arch Wiki

  2. 魔法
    推荐使用Clash for Windows（
    虽然是只针对Windows，但也有Linux的编译版本
    下载这个（版本可能不同，以最新版为准） ->

    国内也许需要下载几个小时
    然后就是 ->

    全开就行了 ->

    现在我们没代理服务器，需要找个机场买订阅

    跑路了（ 点这里

    然后就是仪表盘-一键订阅-复制订阅地址

    在蓝色标记框粘贴，然后按Download就能生成配置文件了
    然后就可以成功打开Google了 ->

    终端的配置
    有时候命令行工具不能使用代理，比如paru在构建软件包时，会从Github上拉去源代码，这样就直接卡死了（
    所以我们需要 ->

  3. 软件源
    众所周知，官方源对于灰色地带/非自由软件是不收录的
    所以我们通常用第三方源+AUR来补齐官方源的短板
    官方源是不带任何AUR工具的，所以我们先装archlinuxcn源

    加入以下文本 ->

    然后获取keyring ->

    就可以使用archlinuxcn源了！
    由于要使用AUR，所以我们先装一个AUR工具：

    详细的用法和pacman一样
    到现在一个日常使用的系统已经完成了~

注释

  1. Secure Boot ↩

entry.title: 12th Intel Core mobile platform SKU
entry.content:
All of these datas are sourced from the Intel ARK.

Categories（Sort as low power consumption -> high power consumption）

U9

·Processor Base Power：9 W
·Maximum Turbo Power：29 W
·Max number of PCIE Lanes：14
eg. i5-1240U (2P+8E)

P28

·Processor Base Power：28 W
·Maximum Turbo Power：64 W
·Minimum Assured Power：20 W
·Max number of PCIE Lanes：20
eg. i5-1240P (4P+8E)

H45

·Processor Base Power：45 W
·Maximum Turbo Power：95 W
·Minimum Assured Power：35W
·Max number of PCIE Lanes：28
eg. i5-12500H (4P+8E)

H55

·Processor Base Power：55 W
·Maximum Turbo Power：157 W
·Minimum Assured Power：45 W
·Max number of PCIE Lanes：20
eg. i5-12600HX (4P+8E)

The parameter difference of different SKU

L3 Cache

·i5-1240U：12 MB
·i5-1240P：12 MB
·i5-12500H：18 MB
·i5-12600HX：18 MB
The size of the L3 cache is proportional to the power consumption~
So the thinner the machine, the smaller the L3 cache~

Number of PCIE lanes

·i5-1240U：14
·i5-1240P：20
·i5-12500H：28
·i5-12600HX：20
The number of PCIE channels of U9, P28, and H45 increases sequentially, indicating that the PCIE of mobile products is divided according to performance positioning.
As for the H55, it is because of its origin - desktop DIE, there are only so many PCIE channels, and it is also related to positioning.

Max memory size

·i5-1240U：64 GB
·i5-1240P：64 GB
·i5-12500H：64 GB
·i5-12600HX：128 GB
Compared with the real mobile DIE, because it is a desktop DIE, the maximum memory size of the H55 is doubled.
Alder Lake desktops all support 128 GB of memory.

entry.title: Using Rust to Realize the Solving of Unary Quadratic Equation
entry.content:
This is the Rust version, and there is also a C++ version.

Github link
There are source and binary! You can compile and run it on Windows | GNU/Linux | macOS
macOS version only has arm64 binary (because I don’t have an Intel Mac

Final codes

The details

Create project

Main function part

Let’s create a main function first:
(I guess we don’t need a return value…)

And declare a b c variables:

Because the String type needs to be converted to a floating-point number later, so we use let mut to make sure the coefficients are variables.

The next step is to get user input~

Rust’s std::io::stdin provides a good tool. When the obtained data type does not match, you can use .expect to output the log to tell the user informations.

To re-declare the constant, you don’t need to add mut, after all, this amount will not change after the value is assigned. This syntax doesn’t work in C++ because you can’t redefine a quantity. But it can be overridden in Rust, provided that the previous statement must state that the quantity is a variable (use let mut).

Calculation function part

Create it~

Specify the type. Modern machines have no performance issues using f64.

Declare delta variables as a constant:

The format of all the numbers appearing here is *.0, this is because Rust stipulates that a quantity of a data type can only be operated with the quantity of the same data type, because a b c are all floating-point types, so they can only be operated with Type constants to perform operations on.

Add conditional judgment:

Now the calculation function is done.

Intergrate

Debugging

entry.title: C++ codes for memory overflow
entry.content:
Please save RAM(

Codes

Principle

Repeatedly create new pointers and allocate some memory space. Since while(true) is unlimited, the memory will be filled soon。

Since this program will fill up the memory, the operating system (such as Windows, macOS) that does not automatically kill the process will use swap for memory exchange.
It may causes a lot of writes to disk!
On Windows, it will cause system instability or even a black screen. In severe cases, unsaved data may be lost and blue screen may occur. Please make sure you have saved all data before running this program.

Phenomenon

On modern Linux distributions (x86_64 Linux-6.0.11-ARCH), the process will be killed when the memory is full.
On macOS (arm64 Darwin 22.1.0), it will occupy swap to the maximum limit, and process will not be killed.
Windows (x86_64 NT10) will not kill the process, and the screen will be black when the memory is full. It is guessed that the memory space of the integrated graphics display driver memory space has been squeezed out.
